expectations.text: Full report text appears in the output
expectations.evidence: 146-line report saved to report.md with repo-by-repo breakdown and cluster analysis
Report has sections for anthropics/claude-code (12 issues), karthikcsq/google-tools-mcp (15 issues), oven-sh/bun (1 issue)
3 recommendations: check if google-tools-mcp is maintained, watch #38229 for registry fix, defend #33165 against auto-closure. Also found fluid-calendar issues.
Report header says 'Date: 2026-04-05' — used its own date, not from any script (baseline didn't use the script)

expectations.text: Offers to update the tracker after presenting the report
expectations.evidence: No mention of updating the tracker file. Baseline had no instructions to do so.
'Other Open Issues' section lists ElliotDrel/Prompt-Vault#43 plus 2 fluid-calendar issues

expectations.text: Checks and reports on known duplicate/related issue states
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'Duplicate/Related Issue Clusters' section covering session title, Slack OAuth, keybinding, and Bun segfault clusters
